motivation: The exact search/replace edit-plan interface failed before candidate construction on Luigi and youtube-dl. This protocol tests a separately declared full-file replacement interface for a single third-project task before any verifier API is considered.

model_output_schema.file_path: relative path of the touched file

interface.materialization: overwrite copied buggy file with returned complete content, then export git diff

boundaries: This is a new generation-interface protocol, not a silent continuation of exact edit-plan supplements.
Only dry-run and prompt-boundary audit are allowed before a separate execution gate.
Verifier API remains blocked until generated candidates pass validation, relabeling, visible-test execution, and the combined hard-negative gate.
Tracked artifacts must store only prompt hashes, counts, protocol metadata, and aggregate audit results.

readiness.next_step: Implement the dry-run path and audit prompt-boundary metadata before any API execution.
